OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Jane Wong appearing on behalf of plaintiff Danny Wong.
Siu Ling Ma appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Victoria Guerra is present.
Robin M. Cleary representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. This case settled, the trial date of September 17, 2007 is vacated.
